revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Last edited by/doc]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:Last edited by/doc]]</includeonly>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing redirects I created with chatGPT
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Last edited by/doc]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:Last edited by/doc]]</includeonly>

#redirect[[:en:Template:Last edited by/doc]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:Last edited by/doc]]</includeonly>

{{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} This template generates a line containing the page type, the last editor of the page, a link to the [[Help:Diff|diff]] for the edit, and the approximate amount of time since the edit (provided by {{tl|Time ago}}). === Usage === * {{last edited by}} renders as * {{last edited by}} while * {{last edited by|brief=yes}} renders as * {{last edited by|brief=yes}} === See also === *[[Help:Magic words]] *{{tl|REVISIONUSER}} *{{tl|REVISIONUSER2}} *{{tl|REVISIONTIMESTAMP}} {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Time, date and calendar templates]] [[ar:قالب:Last edited by]] [[id:Templat:Suntingan terakhir]] [[ja:Template:LastEditedBy]] [[mk:Шаблон:ПоследноУредување]] [[pt:Predefinição:Última edição por]] [[si:සැකිල්ල:අවසන්වරටසංස්කරණයකළේ]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} This template generates a line containing the page type, the last editor of the page, a link to the [[Help:Diff|diff]] for the edit, and the approximate amount of time since the edit (provided by {{tl|Time ago}}). === Usage === * {{last edited by}} renders as * {{last edited by}} while * {{last edited by|brief=yes}} renders as * {{last edited by|brief=yes}} === See also === *[[Help:Magic words]] *{{tl|REVISIONUSER}} *{{tl|REVISIONUSER2}} *{{tl|REVISIONTIMESTAMP}} {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Time, date and calendar templates]] [[ar:قالب:Last edited by]] [[id:Templat:Suntingan terakhir]] [[ja:Template:LastEditedBy]] [[mk:Шаблон:ПоследноУредување]] [[pt:Predefinição:Última edição por]] [[si:සැකිල්ල:අවසන්වරටසංස්කරණයකළේ]] }} [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} This template generates a line containing the page type, the last editor of the page, a link to the [[Help:Diff|diff]] for the edit, and the approximate amount of time since the edit (provided by {{tl|Time ago}}). === Usage === * {{last edited by}} renders as * {{last edited by}} while * {{last edited by|brief=yes}} renders as * {{last edited by|brief=yes}} === See also === *[[Help:Magic words]] *{{tl|REVISIONUSER}} *{{tl|REVISIONUSER2}} *{{tl|REVISIONTIMESTAMP}} {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Time, date and calendar templates]] [[ar:قالب:Last edited by]] [[id:Templat:Suntingan terakhir]] [[ja:Template:LastEditedBy]] [[mk:Шаблон:ПоследноУредување]] [[pt:Predefinição:Última edição por]] [[si:සැකිල්ල:අවසන්වරටසංස්කරණයකළේ]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} This template generates a line containing the page type, the last editor of the page, a link to the [[Help:Diff|diff]] for the edit, and the approximate amount of time since the edit (provided by {{tl|Time ago}}). === Usage === * {{last edited by}} renders as * {{last edited by}} while * {{last edited by|brief=yes}} renders as * {{last edited by|brief=yes}} === See also === *[[Help:Magic words]] *{{tl|REVISIONUSER}} *{{tl|REVISIONUSER2}} *{{tl|REVISIONTIMESTAMP}} {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Time, date and calendar templates]] [[ar:قالب:Last edited by]] [[id:Templat:Suntingan terakhir]] [[ja:Template:LastEditedBy]] [[mk:Шаблон:ПоследноУредување]] [[pt:Predefinição:Última edição por]] [[si:සැකිල්ල:අවසන්වරටසංස්කරණයකළේ]] }} [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23508203007|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} This template generates a line containing the page type, the last editor of the page, a link to the [[Help:Diff|diff]] for the edit, and the approximate amount of time since the edit (provided by {{tl|Time ago}}). === Usage === * {{last edited by}} renders as * {{last edited by}} while * {{last edited by|brief=yes}} renders as * {{last edited by|brief=yes}} === See also === *[[Help:Magic words]] *{{tl|REVISIONUSER}} *{{tl|REVISIONUSER2}} *{{tl|REVISIONTIMESTAMP}} {{Sandbox other|| [[ar:قالب:Last edited by]] [[id:Templat:Suntingan terakhir]] [[ja:Template:LastEditedBy]] [[mk:Шаблон:ПоследноУредување]] [[pt:Predefinição:Última edição por]] [[si:සැකිල්ල:අවසන්වරටසංස්කරණයකළේ]] }} [[Category:Time, date and calendar templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments; consolidate 6 interlanguage link(s) into wikidata link template [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24947213578|time triggered pipeline]]
